reviews.review_description: I cant even play it its glitching so bad...

An outstanding fast-paced cooking simulation! Having explored numerous games of this genre, this one stands out as the best in my opinion. Its environments and levels are particularly well-designed, with waiting customers adding a touch of humor and entertainment. The attention to detail and the gameplay elevate this game to the top. I eagerly anticipate future updates. I have no recommendations to make, as it is evident that the developers master their craft perfectly.

reviews.review_title: OH HELL YA BEST COOKING SIM
reviews.review_description: For anyone that loves cooking sims I highly recommend buying this game. This is simply the best vr cooking game I have ever played to date. The graphics are awesome the gameplay mechanics are superb just make sure you chop things slow haha The modes are great the design is perfect and there is some great humour please get this on the main store so others can enjoy it to

reviews.review_title: The Drinks Were a Huge Problem
reviews.review_description:
This is a pretty great cooking game. I love that it gives instructions as you play.

As others have mentioned, how to grab/slice things takes practice. If you slice too fast, your ingredients go flying!

The campaign is fun and ramps up at a nice speed for learning.

Mostly, I want a way to play other people.

** UPDATED REVIEW **
 I previously gave the game 5 stars but wanted to amend my review to add a few more points to help those who may be thinking of purchasing it.

I purchased and have played this game since the release date and I'm still loving it! What is brilliant is the challenging environments in each wave that you play. To name a few, challenges include serving as many customers as you can during a storm, zero effect gravity, birds stealing food when cooking etc… Furthermore, I really like the different characters such as the crying baby and you have to hurry up and give it ice-cream so it will stop crying and to stop customers from leaving lol!

Enjoyable single player game. There are over 80 variety of dishes. Great amount of replayability. You can play arcade and campaign modes, casual and heroic difficulty. The boss battles are so much fun!!! 

The graphics are very good and the game plays smoothly no glitches. What is incredible is that the game is created by a 2 persons team. 

If you are looking for a different cooking game with unique challenges this is the game for you. I highly recommend it!!!

reviews.review_title: Should be on the official store!!!
reviews.review_description:
I love cooking in VR and this is easily the best on the Quest right now. 

I found it a bit fiddly at first, but I’m so glad I stuck with it. After half an hour I learned how to grab and chop the way the game wants you to and since then it’s been nothing but fun.

I absolutely love the boss battles and the environmental challenges like the Zero G effect. It’s such an enjoyable twist for the genre. 

Really well done

Edit: I should note that I almost never give 5* reviews so take this 4* as a high recommendation indeed

So in short the game is awesome.

Just TWO things id like changed - 

1. The background ruins the view and breaks the immersion because of it clearly being a kinda of flat pasted on wrap around look instead of a 3d space (if that makes sense)

The kitchen and how it sets up and looks is awesome but then when you look around its like the enviroment has just been thrown in last minute with how it looks.

2. This one is just a personal request but EVERY game in VR needs coop! :)

Even if just arcade mode, 2 people behind the line shouting orders and taking different tasks would be great fun!

Simply the best !
And the best single player

I love this game, it is very realistic and a true simulation to the real thing. It is challenging but yet exciting. I hate cooking in real life but for some reason love cooking in VR. Games like this keeps my VR addiction going.

The game is very nice. The interactions are interesting but at the same time very straightforward. I had a great time slicing stuff while keeping an eye on the grill. This is the kind of game that makes you feel in a good mood while playing.

There are several game modes, leaderbords, etc

I only missed some more haptic feedback, the food to get straight on top of the floor when composing It,  and the chance to undone mistakes with the ingredients.

It looks like this game is made by a 2 persons team. Should be very proud of your game.

reviews.review_title: A must-buy cooking title for Quest.
reviews.review_description: Cook-o-tron is a mix of the job simulator part of cooking chef, and cookout, mixed into one, creating the perfect formula of a cooking game. I absolutely loved the game, and recorded a video on it on my channel which you can find here: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=2QHuGETeyB0 . This game is a blast, must-buy!

This game is super fun and is the best “pick up and play” VR game I’ve ever played.  It’s really replayable and I’m super happy I finally got around to playing it

My only complaint is the lack of countertop space but that’s pretty minor compared to how much fun it is.
